name: Coinon
short_description: Find and retrieve all the coins in town to level up before time runs out.
detailed_description:
Checkout And Wishlist Little Kingdoms


About the Game

GamePlay: Find and retrieve all the coins in town to level up before time runs out.

Features:

• Levels: Find coins to level up. Some levels add more time to the timer.

• Timer: If the timer gets to low, game over.

• Food: Pickup food for energy.

• Coins: The goal is to collect them all to win each level.

• Town: A toon town filled with coins to collect.

• Energy: energy drops over time. If energy is 0, game over.
